history.content:
**✅ Prometheus gateway rebooted and Telegram polling resumed.**

The restart picked up three completed tasks from this morning:
- **Tool pairing fix** in Anthropic adapter (deterministic tool_use/tool_result tracking)
- **Switch-model hardening** (fail-open behavior + dynamic provider wording)
- **Intraday notes injection** (removed truncation, full notes now in interactive context)

All builds verified. What would you like me to check or continue with?
